caption: In this image, a group of people wearing aprons and gloves are engaged in the traditional Korean communal activity known as Kimjang, preparing kimchi by mixing salted napa cabbage with red chili paste.
The image depicts a person wearing gloves and an apron, engaged in the traditional Korean communal activity known as Kimjang, preparing a vibrant mix of seasoned napa cabbage and red chili paste.
A group of individuals dressed in traditional white hanbok are waving the Taegeukgi, celebrating the 104th anniversary of the independence movement.
The image depicts a group of individuals dressed in traditional and modern attire, with some holding documents and others waving the Taegeukgi, symbolizing the Korean independence movement.

The image depicts a person adorned in a vibrant red Jeontonghonrye, a traditional Korean wedding attire, standing in front of an open door, showcasing intricate floral patterns and a ceremonial headdress.
In this traditional Korean wedding ceremony, a couple dressed in vibrant hanbok is seated before a ritual table adorned with offerings, symbolizing their union.

The image depicts a traditional Korean ancestral rite (Jesa) setup with various food offerings on a wooden table, including fruits, bread, and other items, set against a backdrop of calligraphy panels.
In this image, a traditional Korean ancestral rite (Jesa) is being performed, featuring a ritual table adorned with various food offerings and family members bowing deeply as part of the ceremony.
A group of people is participating in a Seongmyo ceremony, standing in a line and bowing in respect at a memorial site adorned with statues and surrounded by lush greenery.

In the image, a group of men dressed in formal attire are participating in a Seongmyo ceremony at a Korean cemetery, standing solemnly beside a grave marker adorned with white flowers and a South Korean flag.
The image depicts the Cheomseongdae observatory, a historical Korean structure illuminated at night, showcasing its distinctive cylindrical stacked-stone design and square top frame.
The image depicts the Cheomseongdae observatory, a historical Korean structure with a cylindrical stacked-stone tower and a square top frame, situated in an open field under a clear sky.
The image depicts the Gyeongbokgung Palace at night, showcasing its traditional wooden pavilions with upturned eaves and vibrant dancheong paintwork illuminated against the dark blue sky.
The image depicts the Gyeongbokgung Palace, a traditional Korean royal palace known for its wooden pavilions with upturned eaves, vibrant dancheong paintwork, and elevated stone platforms.

The image depicts the Cheonggyecheon, an urban stream in Seoul, characterized by its shallow waterway bordered by stone embankments and pedestrian walkways, with autumn foliage adding to the scene's beauty.
The image depicts a statue of Admiral Yi Sun-shin, a Korean naval hero, standing tall amidst a modern urban setting with fountains and trees lining the pathway.
The image depicts two individuals performing a Jeol and Sebae, a traditional Korean formal deep bow, in front of an altar adorned with flowers and a framed portrait.
The image depicts a family scene where two children are performing a Jeol and Sebae, a traditional Korean bow, while an adult sits nearby observing.

The image depicts a family scene where two children and an adult are engaged in a traditional Korean Jeol and Sebae bowing ritual, kneeling on the floor with hands on the ground, wearing colorful hanboks.
A group of people stands in front of a statue of Sejongdaewang, the King Sejong the Great, wearing traditional Joseon robes and a winged crown.
The image depicts a statue of Sejongdaewang, King Sejong the Great, seated in royal Joseon robes with a winged crown, situated in an urban setting at dusk.
A person is flying a colorful kite in a park, embodying the spirit of Yeon-nalligi, a traditional Korean kite-flying activity.
A person is flying a rainbow-colored kite in a park under a clear sky, embodying the spirit of Yeon-nalligi, the traditional Korean kite-flying festival.
A group of elderly individuals is engaged in playing Yutnori, a traditional Korean board game, as they sit on the floor around a colorful floral mat.
The image depicts two children dressed in traditional Korean hanbok, engaged in playing yutnori, a traditional Korean board game involving wooden sticks and a game board.
The image depicts a group of women performing the Ganggangsullae, a traditional Korean circle dance, on a wooden platform with a scenic bridge and water in the background.
Ganggangsullae, a traditional Korean circle dance, is performed by women in hanbok, holding hands in a large circle formation on stage under a full moon.

The image depicts a performer dressed in traditional Korean attire, including a yellow top with a purple sash and a blue skirt, engaging in a mask dance known as Talchum, characterized by its vibrant colors and expressive movements.
The image displays an array of intricately designed wooden masks, each with unique facial expressions and vibrant colors, indicative of the traditional Korean masked dance-drama known as Talchum.
The image depicts a bowl of ramyeon, a traditional Korean dish featuring yellow curly noodles in an orange-red spicy broth, accompanied by chopsticks resting on the rim.
The image displays a bowl of ramyeon, a popular Korean instant noodle dish, alongside a container of kimchi, a traditional Korean side dish made from fermented vegetables.

The image showcases a box filled with neatly arranged gimbap, a traditional Korean dish consisting of rice rolls wrapped in seaweed and topped with sesame seeds, showcasing a variety of vibrant fillings including vegetables and possibly seafood.
The image displays a plate of panfried battered meatballs, known as Wanja-jeon, a traditional Korean dish featuring small, round, golden-brown patties coated in batter.
The image showcases a variety of Hangwa, traditional Korean confections, featuring small decorative pieces in pastel colors and pressed floral or geometric patterns.
The image displays a box of Hangwa, traditional Korean confections, featuring an array of pastel-colored decorative pieces with pressed floral and geometric patterns.
The image displays a bowl of Yaksik, a traditional Korean sweet rice dish, featuring a glossy mound of sticky glutinous rice mixed with chestnuts, jujubes, and pine nuts.
The image displays a plate of Yakgwa, a traditional Korean honey cookie, featuring small, flower-shaped and round pastries with a dark golden-brown glossy glaze.
The image depicts a traditional Korean dish known as Bulgogi, featuring thinly sliced marinated beef with a glossy dark-brown glaze, served on a hot plate.

The image depicts a traditional Korean New Year dish known as Tteokguk and Mandu soup, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes (tteok) and crescent-shaped dumplings (mandu), garnished with green onions, red chili peppers, and other colorful toppings.
The image depicts a bowl of Tteokguk and Mandu soup, a traditional Korean New Year dish, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes and crescent-shaped dumplings.
The image displays a plate of Japchae, a traditional Korean dish featuring translucent brown noodles mixed with colorful julienned vegetables and garnished with sesame seeds.
The image depicts a traditional Korean building with a tiled roof and ornate decorations, situated atop a stone wall, embodying the architectural style of Namhansanseong fortress.

The image showcases a serene view of Haenggung, a traditional Korean temporary royal palace, featuring wooden structures with distinctive curved tile roofs and colorful eaves, nestled amidst lush greenery.
The image depicts the Paldalmun Gate, a traditional Korean gate within the Hwaseong Fortress, featuring an arched stone gateway and a wooden pavilion atop it, surrounded by curved fortress walls.
The image captures the iconic EXPO Hanbit Tower, a prominent Korean landmark, standing tall against a cloudy sky, surrounded by lush greenery and modern architectural elements.
The image depicts a group of soldiers gathered around military vehicles in a rural setting, likely during the Korean War period.
The image depicts a desolate urban landscape with dilapidated buildings and overgrown vegetation, indicative of a post-war Korean cityscape.
The image depicts a serene village scene with traditional Korean architecture and people engaged in daily activities near a body of water, set against a backdrop of lush green hills.
A family is enjoying a game of Jegichagi, kicking a colorful shuttlecock into the air with their feet on a sunny day in a park.

The image depicts a child dressed in traditional Korean attire, including a pink vest over a white shirt and gray pants, with one leg lifted as if kicking a jegi, a small paper-and-coin shuttlecock, which is visible in mid-air behind them.
